title: Work Fatigue Interviews 2001
description: The data consist of 34 interviews of persons who had taken part in courses aimed at treating burnout symptoms in a Finnish rehabilitation centre in 2001. The semi-structured interviews had both pre-prepared questions and more open interview sections.
